Subject: Employment Offer Letter

Dear Mr. Tan Wei Ming,

We are pleased to extend to you an offer of employment with Quantum Innovations Pte Ltd, UEN: 200912345Z. You will be appointed to the position of Senior Software Engineer, reporting to Dr. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah. Your monthly gross salary will be SGD 8,500, payable on the last working day of each month.

Your employment will commence on 1st November 2023, subject to the successful completion of all pre-employment checks. Please confirm your acceptance of this offer by signing and returning a copy of this letter by 20th October 2023.

For any inquiries, kindly contact our HR department at +65 6123 4567 or email hr@quantuminnovations.sg.

We look forward to having you join our team.

Sincerely,

Ramasamy Muthu  
Head of Human Resources  
Quantum Innovations Pte Ltd  
NRIC: S7654321B
